## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Abnormal Security and GrowthX to discuss content performance, SEO strategies, and AI presence metrics.](https://fathom.video/share/yPrcNsWqt6RyBBstfH2Y2_1xvdShF5j4?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Clicks grew 27% week-over-week, with impressions up 8% (52k vs 49k)](https://fathom.video/share/yPrcNsWqt6RyBBstfH2Y2_1xvdShF5j4?tab=summary&timestamp=19.0)
  - [32 legacy blog posts identified for refreshing, focusing on bottom-performing content first](https://fathom.video/share/yPrcNsWqt6RyBBstfH2Y2_1xvdShF5j4?tab=summary&timestamp=439.0)
  - [Team agreed to move to bi-weekly meetings with weekly Slack updates and async communication](https://fathom.video/share/yPrcNsWqt6RyBBstfH2Y2_1xvdShF5j4?tab=summary&timestamp=1189.0)

## Topics

### Content Performance Metrics

  - [Clicks increased by 27% week-over-week](https://fathom.video/share/yPrcNsWqt6RyBBstfH2Y2_1xvdShF5j4?tab=summary&timestamp=19.0)
  - [Impressions grew from 49,000 to 52,000 (8% increase)](https://fathom.video/share/yPrcNsWqt6RyBBstfH2Y2_1xvdShF5j4?tab=summary&timestamp=161.0)
  - [AI presence metric (via Scrunch) shows 18% comparative presence, 27% total presence](https://fathom.video/share/yPrcNsWqt6RyBBstfH2Y2_1xvdShF5j4?tab=summary&timestamp=201.0)
  - [Team discussing how to interpret and utilize Scrunch metrics for benchmarking](https://fathom.video/share/yPrcNsWqt6RyBBstfH2Y2_1xvdShF5j4?tab=summary&timestamp=275.0)

### Content Refresh Strategy

  - [32 legacy articles (2021-2023) identified for refreshing](https://fathom.video/share/yPrcNsWqt6RyBBstfH2Y2_1xvdShF5j4?tab=summary&timestamp=439.0)
  - [Focus on bottom-performing posts first, then those with potential to rank better](https://fathom.video/share/yPrcNsWqt6RyBBstfH2Y2_1xvdShF5j4?tab=summary&timestamp=499.0)
  - [Process: Identify main keyword, analyze competitor content, preserve original voice (especially for opinion pieces)](https://fathom.video/share/yPrcNsWqt6RyBBstfH2Y2_1xvdShF5j4?tab=summary&timestamp=533.0)
  - [Update publication dates for significantly revised content to boost SEO](https://fathom.video/share/yPrcNsWqt6RyBBstfH2Y2_1xvdShF5j4?tab=summary&timestamp=829.0)
  - [Consider redirects for outdated content (e.g., old webinars, product updates)](https://fathom.video/share/yPrcNsWqt6RyBBstfH2Y2_1xvdShF5j4?tab=summary&timestamp=952.0)

### Refresh Workflow

  - [Preserve original voice, especially for opinion pieces](https://fathom.video/share/yPrcNsWqt6RyBBstfH2Y2_1xvdShF5j4?tab=summary&timestamp=757.0)
  - [Update images to align with current branding](https://fathom.video/share/yPrcNsWqt6RyBBstfH2Y2_1xvdShF5j4?tab=summary&timestamp=700.0)
  - [For author-assigned posts, provide optimization suggestions rather than rewriting](https://fathom.video/share/yPrcNsWqt6RyBBstfH2Y2_1xvdShF5j4?tab=summary&timestamp=748.0)
  - [Aim to refresh content every 6 months, with a 3-4 month initial performance evaluation period](https://fathom.video/share/yPrcNsWqt6RyBBstfH2Y2_1xvdShF5j4?tab=summary&timestamp=1076.0)

### AI Presence and SEO

  - [Correlation noted between Google rankings and AI mentions](https://fathom.video/share/yPrcNsWqt6RyBBstfH2Y2_1xvdShF5j4?tab=summary&timestamp=420.0)
  - [Recent publication dates important for AI mentions](https://fathom.video/share/yPrcNsWqt6RyBBstfH2Y2_1xvdShF5j4?tab=summary&timestamp=852.0)
  - [Team recognizes value of AI in speeding up content refresh process](https://fathom.video/share/yPrcNsWqt6RyBBstfH2Y2_1xvdShF5j4?tab=summary&timestamp=912.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Implement bi-weekly meeting schedule with weekly Slack updates](https://fathom.video/share/yPrcNsWqt6RyBBstfH2Y2_1xvdShF5j4?tab=summary&timestamp=1189.0)
  - [Mariana to test refresh workflow on one article and develop writing guidelines](https://fathom.video/share/yPrcNsWqt6RyBBstfH2Y2_1xvdShF5j4?tab=summary&timestamp=792.0)
  - [Team to compile list of potential redirects for Abnormal Security to implement](https://fathom.video/share/yPrcNsWqt6RyBBstfH2Y2_1xvdShF5j4?tab=summary&timestamp=968.0)
  - [Continue monitoring performance of recently published content (April onwards) for potential refreshes](https://fathom.video/share/yPrcNsWqt6RyBBstfH2Y2_1xvdShF5j4?tab=summary&timestamp=1056.0)
  - [Update local dashboard report for team's self-service access to metrics](https://fathom.video/share/yPrcNsWqt6RyBBstfH2Y2_1xvdShF5j4?tab=summary&timestamp=1204.0)
